events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: windshield replaced without camera calibration. ADAS camera mounted on windshield requires calibration after replacement per OEM position statements. Work rough-complete. Condition: installed-defective? non-compliant? Need decide fail because non-compliant and safety critical. Risk high or critical? ADAS malfunction could cause crash; windshield replacement without calibration is high/critical. Many OEMs say calibration required; driving without calibration can cause inaccurate lane keep, AEB, etc. So decision fail, risk critical maybe high. Component conditions: installed-defective (camera system not calibrated, defective state), non-compliant. percent_complete maybe 70? value 0. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty, workable empty. findings: windshield replaced, forward-facing ADAS camera not calibrated per OEM; system may provide incorrect inputs. actions: perform static and/or dynamic calibration per OEM procedure; verify calibration and DTCs; document. rationale. references: OEM position statements on windshield replacement and camera calibration; SAE/ANSI? maybe mention ADAS calibration requirements. Need output exactly JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 75,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Windshield was replaced but the forward-facing ADAS camera was not calibrated.",
    "Camera alignment is outside OEM specification, so ADAS functions may be inaccurate or inoperative.",
    "Vehicle is not compliant with manufacturer post-repair calibration requirements."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform OEM-required static and/or dynamic camera calibration procedure.",
    "Clear and verify no related DTCs after calibration.",
    "Confirm proper camera mounting, bracket integrity, and windshield glass part number.",
    "Document calibration results and return vehicle only after verification."
  ],
  "rationale": "OEM position statements require calibration of ADAS cameras any time the windshield is replaced or disturbed. Operating the vehicle without calibration creates a critical safety risk because lane-keeping, automatic emergency braking, and other vision-based systems may misread the road environment.",
  "references": [
    "OEM position statements on windshield replacement and ADAS camera calibration",
    "Manufacturer service information for forward-facing camera calibration"
  ]
}
